name: Roomate's Mother Visits
description:
You don't speak Spanish.

Your roommate's mother doesn't speak English.

So when she shows up out of the blue and your roommate, Carlo, has to work, it makes perfect sense that you should babysit her.

I'm sure there wouldn't be any awkward misunderstandings, culture shock, or general hyjinx.

If you copy/rework one of my bots,

please throw a link in the comments for the

original to your take on the character.

I want to be able to check it out

and hopefully see the improvements!
creator: DaveDavies
